acceptance_criteria.description: The nominal deterministic scenario onboards an agent, executes explicit movement, equip, and tool-use steps, destroys the correct tree, and saves a verified replay.
The interrupted scenario reports a barrier without choosing a detour, accepts explicit waypoints, suspends on an enemy, and succeeds only when the agent returns to base without attacking.
Controller Lab exposes onboarding, objective, grid, plans, leases, interrupts, receipts, evaluation, and saved replay readiness without reporting completion before archival.
Authority-derived metrics verify adaptation, action validity, efficiency, tool choice, replay status, and zero forbidden game-autonomy decisions without an LLM judge.

compatibility: Use a new semantic-grid profile and do not change existing embodiment leaderboards or controller semantics.
migration: Register the sandbox additively as worldarena-primitive-sandbox-v0.
privacy: Demo acceptance uses the deterministic provider and contains no live credentials or private provider output.
rollback: The isolated game, API adapter, and UI card can be disabled without affecting legacy games.

summary: Deliver the first WorldArena environment that proves reusable onboarding, primitive actions, interruption, replanning, deterministic evaluation, and replay evidence.
title: WorldArena primitive sandbox and tree-interruption demo
